## utm-dev utm migrate

Migrate UTM files from local to global location

### Synopsis

Migrate UTM.app and ISOs from local repo paths to global SDK location.

This moves:
  .bin/UTM.app     -> ~/utm-dev-sdks/utm/UTM.app
  .data/utm/iso/*  -> ~/utm-dev-sdks/utm/iso/

VMs and share directories remain local (project-specific).

The migration is idempotent - running it multiple times is safe.

```
utm-dev utm migrate [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help   help for migrate
```

* [utm-dev utm](utm-dev_utm.md)	 - Control UTM virtual machines
